testsuite.name: ExampleEntityProcessor Tests

testcase.name: Should fail processing when entity is invalid
Should process entity with items and calculate totals
Should handle entity with empty items list
Should not support different operation name
Should handle entity with complete nested structures
Should handle entity with null items list
Should handle items with null itemTotal
